sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47052" key="h(mi/braxus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμί-βρᾰχυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εια</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, υ</foreign>, in prosody, <sense id="n47052.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half of a short</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡμιβράχεια</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προσῳδία</foreign>) Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0109.tlg001:p.207" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.207</biblScope> </bibl> H.: pl., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡμιβράχεα, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen></foreign>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0109.tlg001:p.208" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.208</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
